dublinCore.dc:title: 110 S4764 IS: To amend the FISA Amendments Act of 2008 to extend the authorities of title VII of the Foreign Intelligence Surveillance Act of 1978, and for other purposes.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Cotton introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Select Committee on Intelligence

form.official-title: To amend the FISA Amendments Act of 2008 to extend the authorities of title VII of the Foreign Intelligence Surveillance Act of 1978, and for other purposes.

section.header: Extension of authorities of title VII of the Foreign Intelligence Surveillance Act of 1978

subsection.header: Extension of repeal date of title VII
subsection.text: Section 403(b) of the FISA Amendments Act of 2008 (Public Law 110–261) is amended—

paragraph.text: in paragraph (1) (50 U.S.C. 1881 note), by striking June 12, 2026 and inserting July 2, 2026; and
in paragraph (2) (18 U.S.C. 2511 note), in the matter preceding subparagraph (A), by striking June 12, 2026 and inserting July 2, 2026.

subsection.text: The amendments made by this section shall take effect on the earlier of the date of the enactment of this Act or June 11, 2026.
